2026-06-12PSOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Directing that a Proclamation be issued Designating Fire Prevention Week - October 4 to 10, 2026 Order directing that a Proclamation be issued designating the week October 4 to 10, 2026, as Fire Prevention Week.N/A
subject: Order Directing that a Proclamation be issued Designating Fire Prevention Week - October 4 to 10, 2026
precis: Order directing that a Proclamation be issued designating the week October 4 to 10, 2026, as Fire Prevention Week.
